overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk along a rain-soaked Los Santos sidewalk. The scene transitions from moderate to heavy rainfall as vehicles pass by on the adjacent multi-lane avenue, with urban architecture and palm trees visible in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a chain-link fence

entered.detail: tall metal fence running parallel to the sidewalk
tall palm trees silhouetted against city lights in the distance
illuminated urban buildings with blue signage visible across the street
tall street lamp casting light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rainy night in an urban environment. The camera moves along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence on the left, with palm trees and illuminated commercial buildings visible in the distance. Streetlights reflect off the wet pavement as the character walks forward.

events.description: dark SUV passes by on the adjacent wet street
rain intensifies from moderate to heavy downpour with visible streaks

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as a vehicle passes and rain begins to fall harder

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving past on the wet multi-lane avenue

entered.detail: green street sign with white text mounted on a pole at the corner
yellow-painted circular manhole cover on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the camera passes a street sign reading 'Almondell Ave' while a dark SUV drives past on the right. The rain intensifies significantly, creating heavy streaks and splashes on the pavement. The chain-link fence falls behind as the scene opens up slightly, with the manhole cover becoming visible on the sidewalk.

events.description: rain reaches peak intensity with heavy downpour reducing visibility slightly

agents.ego_description: walking through heavy rainfall along the sidewalk, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: intersection of avenues with crosswalks and traffic signals visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment features heavy rainfall as the character continues toward an intersection. The street sign is now behind, and the view opens up to show the cross street ahead. Streetlights and building lights create reflections on the soaked pavement, with palm trees now closer on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that transitions from a steady drizzle into a heavy downpour. It begins by moving past a chain-link fence under the glow of streetlights, with illuminated commercial buildings and distant palm trees reflecting off the wet concrete. As the camera passes an Almondell Ave street sign and a dark SUV drives by, the rain intensifies into heavy streaks and splashes that blur the environment. The scene then opens up as the fence disappears and a manhole cover comes into view, before finally approaching a wide intersection where the soaked pavement mirrors the surrounding city lights and nearby palm trees.
